race.description: The Anglers Inn Punters Club (Bm56) Hcp
race.comment: HARSH (7) has been well found in his last two and despite not delivering his been building nicely. At her top now and should be ready to put it all together out to this trip. THEODOR (2) was below his best last time when sent out favourite at Bordertown but there was form earlier that puts him right in the mix. Draws to land in the right spot and is already a winner over this course and distance for Rawiller. Bold showing anticipated. THE HIGHLANDER (5) made good ground from the back last start at Murray Bridge and should be further improved out this trip. Watch for him running on. BLACK SEA (1) was much better second-up and is another will appreciate stepping out further, though he will likely get a long way back from the draw. Keep an eye on him late.
